description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a long, matte-black metal receiver and barrel with a prominent wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip. The rifle has a curved, detachable box magazine made of metal, which is characteristic of the AK-47 family. The front sight is a post, and the rear sight is a notched tangent, both made of metal and mounted on the barrel and receiver, respectively. The wooden components have a reddish-brown finish, contrasting with the dark metallic body. The muzzle is fitted with a simple slant compensator, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for rugged urban environments. The rifle's construction suggests durability and reliability, with visible screws, pins, and seams indicating assembly points.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with a black metal body, reddish-brown wooden stock, and a curved metal magazine. The design is robust, with iron sights and a slant compensator at the muzzle.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the barrel end, showing the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: The left side of the rifle is visible, displaying the full length of the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the buttstock end, highlighting the narrow profile of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: The right side of the rifle is shown, revealing the ejection port, fire selector, and the full length of the wooden and metal components.
